testCases.title: Switch Org - Pricing Update
testCases.failedAssertion: [FORMAT] Price is different from Org A's price
testCases.notes: Product a8c1da6d (16inch TV) shows identical price $494.00 in both 'Quoted' Double Quotes (Org A) and ACME Store (Org B). No org-specific contract pricing configured for this multi-org user's orgs. Cannot verify pricing differentiation.

testCases.title: Switch Org - Lists Scope
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Org A lists not visible while Org B is active
testCases.notes: Lists 'new1' (3 items) and 'test list' (0 items) appear identical under both ACME Store and 'Quoted' Double Quotes orgs with same list IDs. Lists appear user-scoped rather than org-scoped in this environment.

testCases.title: Switch Org - Navigation Reset
testCases.failedAssertion: [NAV] After switching orgs, user redirected to neutral page (homepage or catalog root) rather than remaining on Org A context page
testCases.notes: User on /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics. After switching from 'Quoted' Double Quotes to ACME Store, URL remained at the same deep category page. Header correctly shows ACME Store / John Doe but page context not reset.

testCases.title: Single Org User - No Switcher
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] No org switcher control visible in header or account area
testCases.notes: USER_EMAIL (mutykovaelena@gmail.com / SmokeTest Runner) is a multi-org user with BMW-Group active and 30+ org memberships — not a single-org user. No single-org test account available in .env.

testCases.title: Org Switch Triggers White-Label Branding Update
testCases.notes: Both 'Quoted' Double Quotes and ACME Store show identical 'B2B-store' logo and theme. No org-specific white-label branding is configured in vcst-qa environment. Precondition not met.

testCases.title: Org Search Bar Hidden for <=10 Organizations
testCases.notes: Requires a user with 10 or fewer org memberships. Multi-org test user has 11 orgs; USER_EMAIL has 30+ orgs. No <=10 org account available.

testCases.title: Org Search - Boundary: Exactly 10 vs 11 Organizations
testCases.notes: Requires two distinct accounts with exactly 10 and exactly 11 orgs respectively. No such boundary-test accounts configured in agent user pool.

testCases.title: Org Search - Leading/Trailing Spaces Handling
testCases.notes: The org switcher closes when the clear button is clicked, making multi-step space-trim verification impractical. No dedicated test fixture for this scenario.

testCases.title: Org Search - Keyboard Navigation in Dropdown
testCases.notes: ArrowDown key pressed on search input. Accessibility snapshot does not expose focus highlight state of list items. Cannot confirm [DOM] Currently highlighted item has visual focus indicator without visual screenshot. Per agent rules: non-verifiable control = BLOCKED, not FAIL.

testCases.title: Cart Isolation - Org-Specific Pricing in Cart
testCases.notes: No org-specific contract pricing configured between orgs for available catalog products. Cannot verify per-org pricing in cart.

testCases.title: Org-Specific Pricing - Contract Price for Org Member
testCases.notes: No product in vcst-qa catalog has org-specific contract pricing configured for the test account's organizations. Cannot distinguish org contract price from store default.

testCases.title: Org-Specific Pricing - Price Changes on Org Switch
testCases.notes: Same root cause as B2C-ORG-002 and B2C-ORG-029: identical pricing across orgs for all checked products.

testCases.title: Org-Specific Pricing - Non-Org User Sees Default Price
testCases.notes: USER_EMAIL (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) is a multi-org user with 30+ org memberships, not a personal/non-org user. Precondition 'personal (non-org) user account' cannot be met.

testCases.title: Ship-To - Default Address Per Org
testCases.notes: Org A has 1 address (101 Special St Philadelphia) with no Default badge. Org B shows multiple c10-org-* addresses also without distinct defaults. Precondition requires each org to have a different configured default address — not set in vcst-qa.

testCases.title: No Default Org - Org Selector Shown on Sign-In
testCases.notes: Test account (ricreyacrouyi-3425@yopmail.com) has a default org configured ('Quoted' Double Quotes loads automatically on sign-in). No test account with multi-org membership but no default org is available.

bugs.title: Org switch does not reset page navigation — user remains on deep category page after switching orgs
bugs.failedAssertion: [NAV] After switching orgs, user redirected to neutral page (homepage or catalog root) rather than remaining on Org A context page
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in as ricreyacrouyi-3425@yopmail.com ('Quoted' Double Quotes active). 2. Navigate to /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics. 3. Open account menu → Organizations → click ACME Store. 4. Observe URL after org switch completes.
bugs.expected: After org switch, user redirected to a neutral page (/ or /catalog) so the page context matches the new org.
bugs.actual: URL remains at /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics. Header correctly shows ACME Store / John Doe but deep-category page context from Org A is not reset.
